name: list_agent_tools
description: Return the EXACT, callable tool names available to agents in this sandbox right now — built from the user's connected integrations + always-on Copass retrieval tools (`discover` / `interpret` / `search`). **Mandatory** before writing `tool_allowlist` on `create_agent` / `update_agent_tools` — integration tools follow a prefixed shape (e.g. `pd_<app_slug>_<remote_tool_name>`); short forms like `slack_add_reaction` will not match. The enforcement layer drops any allowlist entry that doesn't match a real tool — agents with hallucinated names run tool-less. Filter by `app_slug` to narrow to one provider.
